title: The Country Beyond
writer: James Oliver Curwood, Irving Cummings, Ernest Maas
actors: Olive Borden, Ralph Graves, Gertrude Astor
plot: In the Canadian mountains an orphan girl, Valencia, is left in the care of the abusive Hawkins family. A fugitive outlaw, Roger McKay, stumbles onto the property and immediately falls in love with Valencia. When Mr. Hawkins is kil...
